news.title:
Adani Total Gas Ltd keeps CNG, PNG prices unchanged despite supply issues.
Supply curbs imposed on large industrial consumers amid West Asia crisis.
news.summary:
Adani Total Gas Ltd keeps CNG, PNG prices unchanged despite supply issues.
Supply curbs imposed on large industrial consumers amid West Asia crisis.

news.title:
Adani Total Gas raises industrial gas prices to ₹119/scm due to LNG supply disruptions amid Middle East conflict.
Strait of Hormuz tensions impact energy markets; higher costs may affect industries relying on natural gas.
news.summary:
Adani Total Gas raises industrial gas prices to ₹119/scm due to LNG supply disruptions amid Middle East conflict.

news.title: Adani Total Gas faces reduced gas supply and operational challenges due to global political events.

news.title:
Adani Total Gas Dec '25 net sales rose 16.1% YoY to Rs 1,499.3 cr, profit up 9.6% YoY.
EBITDA grew 14.9% to Rs 312.6 cr; EPS increased to Rs 1.43 from Rs 1.30.
news.summary:
Adani Total Gas Dec '25 net sales rose 16.1% YoY to Rs 1,499.3 cr, profit up 9.6% YoY.
EBITDA grew 14.9% to Rs 312.6 cr; EPS increased to Rs 1.43 from Rs 1.30.

news.title:
City gas firms like Adani Total Gas, Indraprastha Gas, and Gujarat Gas are expanding into smaller cities for growth.
Adani focuses on infrastructure expansion; Indraprastha and Gujarat Gas emphasize steady returns in growing areas.
news.summary:
City gas firms like Adani Total Gas, Indraprastha Gas, and Gujarat Gas are expanding into smaller cities for growth.
Adani focuses on infrastructure expansion; Indraprastha and Gujarat Gas emphasize steady returns in growing areas.

news.title:
Adani Total Gas (ATGL) reported 17% YoY growth in Q3 FY26 revenue to INR1,631 crore, driven by CNG and PNG volume increases.
ATGL added 18 CNG stations, reaching 680 total, expanded its pipeline network, and achieved a 10% YoY rise in its domestic PNG consumer base to 1.05 million.
news.summary:
Adani Total Gas (ATGL) reported 17% YoY growth in Q3 FY26 revenue to INR1,631 crore, driven by CNG and PNG volume increases.
ATGL added 18 CNG stations, reaching 680 total, expanded its pipeline network, and achieved a 10% YoY rise in its domestic PNG consumer base to 1.05 million.

news.title:
Adani Total Gas to set up 10,000 EV charging points, boosting sustainable energy.
The company expects strong growth in CNG stations and upcoming quarter performance.
news.summary:

news.title:
Adani Enterprises fell 10.8% to ₹1,861.8 after U.S. SEC sought direct summons over bribery cases.
The stock opened at ₹2,080, peaked at ₹2,082, but dropped to ₹1,848 before slight recovery.
news.summary:
Adani Enterprises fell 10.8% to ₹1,861.8 after U.S. SEC sought direct summons over bribery cases.
The stock opened at ₹2,080, peaked at ₹2,082, but dropped to ₹1,848 before slight recovery.

The move provides direct relief to households and motorists across multiple markets.

news.title:
Adani Total Gas surged 8%, leading Adani Group stocks; NDTV rose 3%, Adani Power 5%.
Adani Green Energy gained 1%, Adani Enterprises 1%, and Adani Ports 0.7%, reflecting strong momentum.

news.title:

Mr. Jhaveri, with 30 years experience, has been Financial Controller since 2007.

news.title:
Adani Total Gas's largest shareholders are private companies (42%) and public companies (37%).
Top 2 shareholders control over 50%, while insiders own <1% and general public holds 11%.

news.title:
Adani Total Gas saw 16% YoY volume growth and 20% revenue rise to INR 1569 Cr in Q2FY26.
Q2FY26 EBITDA stood at INR 302 Cr, PAT at INR 162 Cr; credit ratings upgraded to AA by three agencies.
news.summary:
Adani Total Gas saw 16% YoY volume growth and 20% revenue rise to INR 1569 Cr in Q2FY26.
Q2FY26 EBITDA stood at INR 302 Cr, PAT at INR 162 Cr; credit ratings upgraded to AA by three agencies.
